nodes.name: types.rs
nodes.summary: Core type definitions for the sublinear solver: CsrMatrix sparse storage, Algorithm/QueryType enums, sparsity profile, compute budget, and SolverResult.

nodes.name: CsrMatrix
nodes.summary: Generic compressed-sparse-row matrix with row_ptr/col_idx/values; specialized f32 and f64 impls for SpMV and conversion.

nodes.name: Algorithm
nodes.summary: Solver algorithm tag (Neumann, ConjugateGradient, Push variants, etc.) selected by the router based on profile.

nodes.name: QueryType
nodes.summary: Tags the kind of query (single solve, PPR, full vector) to route to the right kernel.

nodes.name: SparsityProfile
nodes.summary: Captured nnz/density/diagonal-dominance characteristics that drive router algorithm selection.

nodes.name: ComputeBudget
nodes.summary: Iteration/time/tolerance budget governing solver termination and lane selection.

nodes.name: SolverResult
nodes.summary: Generic solver output containing solution vector, convergence info, and algorithm chosen.

nodes.name: validation.rs
nodes.summary: Input/output validators rejecting NaN/Inf, dimension mismatches, bad CSR structure, and oversized payloads before solve.

nodes.name: validate_csr_matrix
nodes.summary: Validates CSR structural integrity and finite values for an f32 matrix.

nodes.name: validate_solver_input
nodes.summary: Composite check on matrix, rhs, and parameters at the API boundary.

nodes.name: validate_output
nodes.summary: Sanity checks on SolverResult ensuring finite solution and reasonable convergence stats.

nodes.name: helpers.rs
nodes.summary: Shared test fixtures: LCG RNG, random SPD/Laplacian/diag-dominant CSR generators, dense solver oracle and error metrics.

nodes.name: Lcg
nodes.summary: Deterministic linear congruential RNG for reproducible test inputs.

nodes.name: random_spd_csr
nodes.summary: Builds a random symmetric positive-definite CSR matrix for CG tests.

nodes.name: dense_solve
nodes.summary: Reference dense Gaussian-elimination solve used as ground truth for sparse solver outputs.

nodes.name: test_cg.rs
nodes.summary: Conjugate-gradient solver tests across SPD, Laplacian, preconditioned, and tolerance scenarios.

nodes.name: test_csr_matrix.rs
nodes.summary: Unit tests for CSR construction, SpMV, density, transpose, identity/diagonal/symmetric matrices.

nodes.name: test_neumann.rs
nodes.summary: Neumann-series solver tests checking diagonal dominance, convergence rate, and spectral-radius safeguard.

nodes.name: test_push.rs
nodes.summary: Forward/backward push and random-walk PPR tests on synthetic graphs (star, complete, cycle).

nodes.name: test_router.rs
nodes.summary: Router selection tests verifying Neumann/CG/push picks and fallback chain behavior.

nodes.name: test_validation.rs
nodes.summary: Validation rejection tests for NaN, Inf, dimension mismatch, bad CSR, and oversized inputs.

nodes.name: build.rs
nodes.summary: napi-rs Cargo build script setting up Node.js native module build.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the Node.js (napi-rs) binding crate of the solver.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Node.js N-API solver wrapper exposing NapiSolver with Jacobi/Gauss-Seidel/Neumann/CG kernels, PageRank, and complexity estimation.

nodes.name: NapiSolver
nodes.summary: Primary N-API class exposing solve, page_rank, complexity, and history APIs to Node.js consumers.

nodes.name: dispatch_solver
nodes.summary: Dispatches to the appropriate iterative kernel (Jacobi/GS/Neumann/CG) based on the parsed Algorithm.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the wasm-bindgen browser/JS binding of the solver.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: WASM solver entry point exposing JsSolver with sparsity analysis, algorithm selection, Neumann/CG, and PPR power iteration.

nodes.name: JsSolver
nodes.summary: wasm-bindgen exported solver entry with auto-selecting Neumann/CG/PPR backends.

nodes.name: analyze_sparsity
nodes.summary: Computes a SparsityProfile from a CSR matrix to drive algorithm selection.

nodes.name: utils.rs
nodes.summary: WASM utility shims: console_log, panic hook, and CSR construction from JS typed arrays.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the temporal-tensor tiered compression and storage crate.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the temporal-tensor crate covering tiered storage, delta chains, and compression strategy.

nodes.name: agentdb.rs
nodes.summary: Pattern-vector index and adaptive tiering driven by cosine similarity over per-block metadata signatures.

nodes.name: PatternIndex
nodes.summary: Indexable embedding store interface used by adaptive tiering to find similar access patterns.

nodes.name: AdaptiveTiering
nodes.summary: Generic tiering policy using a PatternIndex to learn from historical block access patterns.

nodes.name: bitpack.rs
nodes.summary: Low-level pack/unpack of variable-bit-width integer codes used by the quantizer.

nodes.name: pack
nodes.summary: Bit-packs an arbitrary-width code stream into a contiguous byte buffer.

nodes.name: unpack
nodes.summary: Inverse of pack: reconstructs integer codes from a packed byte buffer.

nodes.name: coherence.rs
nodes.summary: Coherence checking: measures max relative error against original tensors and tracks epoch boundaries.

nodes.name: CoherenceCheck
nodes.summary: Runs reconstruction-quality checks across tiers and reports max/avg error.

nodes.name: EpochTracker
nodes.summary: Tracks epoch boundaries for snapshot consistency across the tiered store.

nodes.name: compressor.rs
nodes.summary: High-level TemporalTensorCompressor wrapping the quantizer/segment encoder with a tier policy.

nodes.name: TemporalTensorCompressor
nodes.summary: Stateful encoder that produces tiered compressed segments for time-series tensors.

nodes.name: core_trait.rs
nodes.summary: TensorStore core trait abstraction and snapshot/extension surface implemented by TieredStore.

nodes.name: TensorStore
nodes.summary: Primary tensor-store interface: put/get/evict/snapshot operations over block keys.

nodes.name: TensorStoreExt
nodes.summary: Extension trait providing convenience methods built atop the core TensorStore.
